when_to_use: Building industrial-strength NLP pipelines with spaCy
Training custom NER models on domain-specific text corpora

pros: Self-hosted — no API cost or lock-in
cons: Training custom models needs real ML skill
review.verdict: Still the best choice for high-volume deterministic NLP, even if LLMs steal the headlines.
review.best_for: Backend teams processing millions of docs where cost and latency matter
review.not_for: Teams that want zero-training semantic understanding via a single API call
